name: MAG-7 | 灼烧之痕
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been spray-painted in layers then distressed to give the appearance of burning edges. It always begins with a tiny spark
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器先是在表面被喷漆，接着通过磨损的方式使其表现出燃烧的痕迹。 星星之火可以灼痕
